programmes.show_description: You Know When You're Losing a Fight: Mai Ling's wedding briefly unites the Hop Wei and Long Zii, but Li Yong receives a grim warning from Kong Pak. (S3, ep 8 of 10)
A burglar is arrested twice within days, a helicopter is used to find a woman heard screaming in a park, and an argument over cigarettes turns nasty. (S5, ep 4)
Action-packed documentary following rapid response officers, the fastest cops in Britain, as they crack down on crime. Time is of the essence! (S3, ep 7)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S8, ep 7)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S8, ep 8)
A lovesick Lithuanian begs for mercy, customs find enough a truckload of cigarettes, and Biosecurity deal with a sneaky pest trying to hitchhike into the country. (S11, ep 1)
A Nigerian national kicks-off with Border agencies, Customs deal with a fishy parcel from Africa, and Immigration talk to a tricky DJ trying to work without a visa. (S11, ep 2)
Documentary following the men and women who help keep motorists safe on some of the most perilous highways and byways of New Zealand. (S9, ep 5)
Documentary following the men and women who help keep motorists safe on some of the most perilous highways and byways of New Zealand. (S9, ep 6)
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
A frightening case of road rage unfolds as a drunk man attacks another car with an axe and a truck takes out a car in spectacular fashion. (S16, ep 13)
A pedestrian is lucky to be alive after a stroll down the motorway and a commuter spies another driver doing something he shouldn't. (S16, ep 14)
A traveller's belongings raise repeated alarms, and a man's reasons for studying in Canada may not be academic. Plus, an American couple make the move to Alaska. (S2, ep 12)
A currency dog sniffs out thousands in undeclared cash, and an aspiring actor can't keep track of the plot. Plus, officers arrest a wanted burglar. (S2, ep 13)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists. (S5, ep 16)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists. (S5, ep 17)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists. (S5, ep 18)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists. (S5, ep 19)
Buckle up! It's time for a new series of Caught on Dashcam. The show that brings you the thrills and spills from the world of driving - all caught on camera! (S6, ep 1)
From distracted drivers to animals on the attack and an unmissable heroic rescue - join us for a brand-new episode of Caught on Dashcam. (S6, ep 2)
Strap in for a brand-new episode of Caught on Dashcam, with more thrills and spills from the world of driving - all caught on camera! (S6, ep 3)
From crazed drivers and ferocious tornadoes to out-of-control driverless cars - join us for a brand-new episode of Caught on Dashcam! (S6, ep 4)
From rambunctious rammers to disastrous driving conditions - join us for a brand-new episode of Caught on Dashcam! (S6, ep 5)
Paradise: Sisko and O'Brien are stranded on a planet inhabited by a colony of humans who have rejected any form of technology.
Tangent: A test flight of a recovered Goa'uld death glider goes awry, sending Teal'c and O'Neill hurtling into space. (S4, ep 12)
Renaissance Man: The Doctor must impersonate various crew members when Captain Janeway is abducted and held hostage for Voyager's warp core. (S7, ep 24)
Home Soil: A powerful microscopic life form declares war on humans, takes over the Enterprise's lab and computers and threatens to destroy the ship.
Officers zero in on a passenger returning from China with two extra passports in his bag. A container from Lebanon hides hundreds of illicit items. (S15, ep 19)
A suitcase with unusual lining sets alarm bells ringing. Two women from China have more to declare than they're letting on. (S15, ep 20)
The Body Under the Stairs: A woman's killer remains at large for more than 30 years, until forensic investigators track him down with a tiny clue at the scene. (S2, ep 12)
After his daughter is murdered, a high school coach takes matters into his own hands and hunts down her killers. Violent action thriller. (2023)
All of Death Is Going Home: Ah Sahm makes a bold sacrifice to protect Yan Mi, as Mai Ling reckons with the consequences of her actions. (S3, ep 9 of 10)
Police hunt for a man wanted for domestic violence, while a tip-off leads to a drugs raid, and an uninsured driver initiates a high-speed car chase. (S5, ep 5)
Action-packed documentary following rapid response officers, the fastest cops in Britain, as they crack down on crime. Time is of the essence! (S3, ep 8)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S8, ep 9)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S8, ep 10)
A British national plans his very own Brexit. A package of happiness arrives at the mail centre, and Customs go on a boat-hunt in the Bay of Islands. (S11, ep 3)
An American woman attempts to smuggle a live cat across the border, and Customs find a soft toy stuffed with more than just stuffing... (S11, ep 4)
Documentary following the men and women who help keep motorists safe on some of the most perilous highways and byways of New Zealand. (S9, ep 7)
Documentary following the men and women who help keep motorists safe on some of the most perilous highways and byways of New Zealand. (S9, ep 8)
Follow the work of the New Zealand Customs agents in their quest to prevent illegal items passing through the country's borders. (S10, ep 5)
Follow the work of the New Zealand Customs agents in their quest to prevent illegal items passing through the country's borders. (S10, ep 6)
Follow the work of the New Zealand Customs agents in their quest to prevent illegal items passing through the country's borders. (S10, ep 7)
Follow the work of the New Zealand Customs agents in their quest to prevent illegal items passing through the country's borders. (S10, ep 8)
An officer suspects a US resident returning from the Caribbean may be hiding something and two construction workers wind up at the border by mistake. (S1, ep 19)
At Detroit Metro Airport, a pregnant Chinese national has CBP asking questions and a security breach on the tarmac leads officers to a jet bound for Haiti. (S1, ep 20)
A look at the clever new methods the police and public are using to catch criminals. (S7, ep 5)
A look at the clever new methods the police and public are using to catch criminals. (S7, ep 6)
A look at the clever new methods the police and public are using to catch criminals. (S7, ep 7)
A Canadian is interviewed under oath after CBP discovers pictures of pot plants on his phone. Without paperwork, it could be curtains for a Venezuelan conductor. (S1, ep 21)
CBP questions a Canadian attempting to enter the US with three of his American family members. An officer has no time for a Swiss traveller's watch declaration. (S1, ep 22)
Documentary series following Australian Customs and Border Protection officers as they attempt to enforce the country's customs, quarantine and immigration laws. (S14, ep 5)
Documentary series following Australian Customs and Border Protection officers as they attempt to enforce the country's customs, quarantine and immigration laws. (S14, ep 6)
A couple from Vietnam come to claim a lost suitcase but what's hidden inside will change their lives forever. Some suspicious-smelling parcels land at the Mail Centre. (S15, ep 1)
Border Force investigate when it emerges that two young women have had their plane tickets paid for by someone they don't know. (S15, ep 2)
Officers suspect a Brazilian man is lying to them and the truth may lay in his bag. A Chinese student in a hurry attracts the attention of Biosecurity officers. (S15, ep 3)
Things go from bad to worse for a young man when drugs are found in his bag and his fiancee is left further unimpressed by what is revealed next. (S15, ep 4)
A woman shocks the team with an incredible revelation as her bags are searched when a drug detector dog raises the alarm. A nervous passenger attracts attention. (S15, ep 5)
The contents of a young woman from China's suitcase could have catastrophic results for an entire industry. Two brothers claiming to be tourists are caught out in a lie. (S15, ep 6)
A nervous man claims he has arrived to visit his wife for their wedding anniversary but what's in his luggage may spell the end of his trip. A drug delivery is intercepted. (S15, ep 7)
A man from Amsterdam says he's here for a holiday, but his suspicious travel itinerary through China and an empty suitcase seem to tell a very different story. (S15, ep 8)
Look back at how the gangs have fared throughout this bizarre year of lockdown and return to normal. (S1, ep 5)
Ngorongoro Crater - Cursed Haven: Tanzania's vast Ngorongoro Crater is in many ways a perfect home for wildlife. However, its isolation also threatens their futures. (S1, ep 6)
Feel the heat when the pride tries to hunt down adequate food as drought conditions push them (and their prey) dangerously close to death. (3 of 5)
From pesky traffic tricksters, navigation nightmares and terrifying tornadoes - join us for another exciting episode of Caught on Dashcam! (S6, ep 8)
When a man is forced back into the services of his town's kingpin, he learns to stop at nothing to protect his family. With Orlando Bloom. Contains strong language and violence. (2023)
From drivers forgetting the basics to hacks that'll raise eyebrows, plus a face-off between cops versus animals - we've got it all Caught on Dashcam! (S5, ep 8)
